records.stderr_pattern: requires a different Python version.*not in '>=
records.description: Package requires a newer Python version — cannot fix via env; report the constraint to the user

reproduction.command: python3 -c "import sys; print(f'Python {sys.version}'); exit(1) if sys.version_info < (3,99) else None" 2>&1; echo 'ERROR: requires Python >=3.99' >&2 || true

records.description: pip dependency resolution conflict — cannot resolve automatically; report conflict details to user

reproduction.command: bash -c 'echo "ERROR: pip dependency resolver found conflicting dependencies: urllib3==1.25.0 incompatible with requests==2.31.0 (requires urllib3>=1.26)" >&2; exit 1' 2>&1 || true
reproduction.fix_command: bash -c 'echo "Conflict reported to user — manual resolution required (simulated)"; exit 0' 2>&1 || true
